[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Burst], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +2 [Burst] Count

[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Burst], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict 2 [AttackDown]

[WhenUse] If target has 3+ [Burst], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Burst], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict 2 [AttackDown]

1050901.name: Buy Time
1050901.desc: Clash Power +1 in a Clash against targets with [Burst]

1050921.name: My Responsibility
1050921.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed hits an enemy with 6+ [Burst], inflict 1 [AttackDown] (3 times per enemy per turn)

1050931.name: My Responsibility
1050931.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed hits an enemy with 3+ [Burst], inflict 1 [AttackDown] (3 times per enemy per turn)

1050911.name: Buy Time
1050911.desc:
Clash Power +1 against targets with [Burst]
Clash Power +2 if the target has 5+ [Burst] Count
